zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stockham於1520年出生在英國時，她的父親John Stockham25歲，母親Jane Stockham47歲。她於1536年與William Carpenter在英國英格蘭維爾爾結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1596年10月5日在英國英格蘭維爾爾馬登享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Stockham于1520年出生在英国时，她的父亲John Stockham25岁，母亲Jane Stockham47岁。她于1536年与William Carpenter在英国英格兰維爾爾结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1596年10月5日在英国英格兰維爾爾馬登享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stockham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Stockham in Witheridge (Devon), from Old English stōd ‘stud, herd of horses’ + cumb ‘valley’.
habitational name from Stockham Marsh in Bremhill (Wiltshire), which may derive from Old English stocc ‘tree trunk, stump’ + hamm ‘water meadow’ or hām ‘village, homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stockham was born in 1520, in England, her father, John Stockham, was 25 and her mother, Jane Stockham, was 47. She married William Carpenter in 1536, in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 5 October 1596, in Marden, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Stockham est née en 1520, à Angleterre, son père, John Stockham, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jane Stockham, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé William Carpenter en 1536, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 octobre 1596, à Marden, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Stockham 1520 in England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Stockham 25 und ihre Mutter Jane Stockham 47. Sie hat 1536 in Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom William Carpenter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. Oktober 1596 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Marden, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stockham è nata il nel 1520 nel England, sua padre, John Stockham, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Jane Stockham, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato William Carpenter nel 1536, nel Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 5 ottobre 1596, nel Marden, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stockhamが1520年にイギリスで生まれた時，父John Stockhamは25歳，母Jane Stockhamは47歳であった。1536年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアでWilliam Carpenterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1596年10月5日にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアマルデンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stockham(이)가 1520년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Stockham(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Stockham(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1536년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르에서 William Carpenter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1596년 10월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 마든에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Stockham nasceu em 1520, em Inglaterra, seu pai, John Stockham, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Jane Stockham, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com William Carpenter em 1536, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de outubro de 1596, em Marden, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Stockham родилась в 1520 г. в местности Англия, её отцу по имени John Stockham было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Stockham, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Carpenter в 1536 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 5 октября 1596 г. в местности марден, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Stockham nació en 1520, en Inglaterra, su papá, John Stockham, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Jane Stockham, tenía 47 años. Se casó con William Carpenter en 1536, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 5 de octubre de 1596, en Marden, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
